rows.label: qev060609_MSG0001
rows.name:
Have you spoken with our
new comrade... Orleron?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060609_MSG0002
rows.name:
...Arsenican has expelled a
magnificent brethren. This is
truly the fruit of revoltanting.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060609_MSG0003
rows.name:
That argument from earlier...
You ended up witnessing it,
didn't you. I am deeply ashamed.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060609_MSG0004
rows.name:
Even so, why did Orleron turn out
to be that kind of Zaruboggan?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060609_MSG0005
rows.name:
Could it be that the environment
of NLA is simply not good for
us Zaruboggan after all?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060609_SEL0011
rows.name: Nod and agree that might be the case.

rows.label: qev060609_SEL0021
rows.name: Shake your head and state that is absolutely not true.

rows.label: qev060609_MSG0006
rows.name:
Is that so... Hearing an
Earthling like yourself say
that makes it very persuasive.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060609_MSG0007
rows.name:
Perhaps a method of education that
isolates them from Earthlings during
their childhood phase is necessary...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060609_MSG0008
rows.name:
That is true... The fact is, we
and all of you are managing to
get along quite well like this.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060609_MSG0009
rows.name:
If we just alter the way we interact
slightly... A tragedy like Orleron
might not have to happen again.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060609_MSG0010
rows.name:
Orleron has truly grown into
a reliable Zaruboggan.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060609_MSG0011
rows.name:
I want him to continue straight
along the path Golbogga showed
us on the Day of Rebirth...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060609_MSG0012
rows.name:
And someday, I want him to
take over my position.[ST:wait ]
